summary: Iteration 6 - Dashboard Separation by Role Testing Complete. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI correctly separates Super Admin (strategic) and CEO/Owner (operational) dashboards. Sidebar menus are properly filtered by role. Quick actions navigation works on both dashboards.

backend: Super Admin /api/admin/platform-stats returns global platform stats (total_users, total_shops, total_revenue, users_by_role) ✅
Super Admin /api/admin/users returns list of users ✅
Super Admin /api/admin/shops returns list of shops ✅
Super Admin /api/admin/subscriptions returns list of subscription plans ✅
CEO /api/dashboard/stats returns shop-specific stats (today_sales, monthly_revenue, products, employees, balances) ✅
CEO CAN access admin endpoints (is_admin_role includes ceo) - separation is in frontend UI ✅
Super Admin can access dashboard stats ✅
frontend: Super Admin sees 'Administration Plateforme' title with 'Vue strategique globale' subtitle ✅
Super Admin sidebar shows ONLY admin items: Vue Plateforme, Gestion Utilisateurs, Gestion Boutiques, Abonnements, CEO Control, IRP Incidents, Securite, BINTRONIX Assets ✅
Super Admin sidebar does NOT show operational items (Produits, Stock, Employes, Ventes POS, Retours, Finances, RH IA, Marketing IA) ✅
Super Admin dashboard shows platform-level stats: Utilisateurs Total, Boutiques Total, Revenu Total, Ventes Totales ✅
Super Admin quick actions work: Gestion Utilisateurs → /admin/users, Gestion Boutiques → /admin/shops, Abonnements → /admin/subscriptions, Securite → /security ✅
CEO sees 'Mon Dashboard' title with 'Vue operationnelle de votre boutique' subtitle ✅
CEO sidebar shows ONLY operational items: Dashboard, Ma Boutique, Produits, Stock, Employes, Ventes (POS), Retours, Finances, RH IA, Marketing IA ✅
CEO sidebar does NOT show admin-only items (Gestion Utilisateurs, Gestion Boutiques, CEO Control, IRP) ✅
CEO dashboard shows shop-level stats: Ventes Aujourd'hui, Revenus Mensuels, Produits, Employes ✅
CEO dashboard shows account balances: Cash, Orange Money, Banque ✅
CEO quick actions work: Nouvelle Vente → /pos, Produits → /products, Stock → /stock, Employes → /employees, Finances → /finances, Retours → /returns ✅

critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard separation by role is correctly implemented in DashboardPage.jsx - dispatches to SuperAdminDashboard, OwnerDashboard, or SellerDashboard based on user role
SuperAdminDashboard.jsx correctly calls /api/admin/platform-stats for global platform metrics
OwnerDashboard.jsx correctly calls /api/dashboard/stats for shop-specific metrics
DashboardLayout.jsx sidebar filtering works correctly using section groups (admin, owner, seller, common)
Note: CEO has is_admin_role=True in backend, so they CAN access admin endpoints - the separation is enforced in the frontend UI (sidebar menu filtering), not backend RBAC
Quick actions on both dashboards navigate to correct routes

super_admin_strategic_dashboard.detail: Shows platform-level stats (total users, shops, revenue), admin-only sidebar, quick actions to admin pages

ceo_operational_dashboard.detail: Shows shop-level stats (today sales, monthly revenue, products, employees), operational sidebar, quick actions to shop management pages

sidebar_role_filtering.detail: Super Admin sees admin section only, CEO sees owner section only, no mixing of strategic and operational views

quick_actions_navigation.detail: All quick action buttons navigate to correct routes on both dashboards

api_platform_stats.detail: /api/admin/platform-stats returns global metrics (requires super_admin or ceo)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard separation by role is fully verified. Super Admin sees strategic platform view, CEO sees operational shop view. Sidebar menus are correctly filtered. All APIs working. Note: CEO has admin-level backend access (is_admin_role=True) but frontend correctly hides admin menu items from CEO.
